title: Spicy Flaky Mung Beans Salad
description: A refreshing and spicy brunch dish featuring mung bean sprouts in a crispy texture, perfect for reducing meal times.
instructions: Soak the mung beans overnight in water.
Drain and rinse the soaked mung beans. Add to a pot with 2 cups of fresh water, bring to boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about an hour or until tender but still crisp.
Remove from heat, drain excess water, let cool slightly, then chop into small pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooled mung beans with olive oil, salt, black pepper, red onion, scallions, and dill. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Squeeze in the lime juice over the mixture and mix again until it's combined properly.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
